The search successfully retrieved the exact foundational paper I targeted: "Hidden Technical Debt in Machine Learning Systems" by Sculley et al. (2015). This is the seminal work that first systematically categorized the non-modeling challenges (data collection, feature extraction, infrastructure, monitoring, etc.) that dominate real-world ML deployments. It perfectly fits the categories of summarizing existing literature (Category 1) and highlighting research gaps (Category 5). I will select index 0.
